svg.title: Cyclic homology and Connes' SBI long exact sequence
svg.desc: A schematic placeholder showing the cyclic action tau on Hochschild chains, the Connes-Tsygan bicomplex with vertical b and horizontal 1 minus tau, the SBI long exact sequence HH_n to HC_n to HC_{n-2} to HH_{n-1}, the periodic cyclic homology HP_* as the inverse limit under S, and the HKR cyclic identification HC_n cong Omega^n / d Omega^{n-1} plus de Rham cohomology in lower degrees for a smooth commutative algebra in characteristic zero.

g.text: Cyclic action τ on A ⊗ A^⊗n: cyclic refinement of Hochschild
Connes-Tsygan bicomplex: vertical b, horizontal 1 - τ, N, B
HKR cyclic (Connes 1985 IHES 62, char k = 0, smooth A):
HP_n(A) ≅ ⊕_{i ≡ n (2)} H^i_dR(A/k) — noncommutative de Rham

svg.text: Cyclic homology and Connes' SBI long exact sequence
